onboarding_title_1: All Drug Warehouses in One Place
onboarding_description_1: Browse hundreds of products from multiple warehouses, compare prices, and choose the best option for your pharmacy with a single tap.
onboarding_description_2: Add products from different warehouses to a single cart and save time and effort in managing your daily purchases.
onboarding_description_3: Take advantage of available discount coupons and track your orders from confirmation to delivery.
